name: Sesame Salmon Boats
recipeIngredient: 7 3/4 oz can Bumble Bee Red salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the salmon and remove the skin, if desired.
2. Mash the bones of the salmon.
3. Halve the avocado and remove the seed. Place each half on a salad plate lined with crisp salad greens.
4. Sprinkle lemon juice over the avocado halves.
5. Combine mayonnaise, dill weed, garlic salt, and 1 tsp toasted sesame seeds in a bowl.
6. Fold in the mashed salmon bones and remaining salmon flesh.
7. Spoon the mixture into the avocado halves.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining toasted sesame seeds before serving.
9. Makes 2 servings.
